---
name: Song not matched / missing from list
about: A song with lyrics isn't showing up in the app
title: '[Matching] '
labels: matching
assignees: ''
---

## Which song isn't being matched?

**Audio filename:** (e.g. `My Song_mastered.wav`)
**Lyrics filename:** (e.g. `My Söng.txt`)

## What have you tried?

- [ ] Both files are in the same folder
- [ ] The lyrics file has a `.txt` or `.md` extension
- [ ] Checked for spelling differences between filenames

## Additional context
Any other naming conventions or special characters in the filenames?
